hyperedges.label: Explicit-over-Implicit Design Philosophy
hyperedges.description: Cluster of design decisions that share a common philosophy: prefer explicitness, directness, and user-visible behavior over hidden defaults, silent fallbacks, or magical abstractions.

hyperedges.label: Adapter Health Issue Cluster
hyperedges.description: All pending high/medium issues related to adapter reliability: CSS selectors, JS rendering, anti-bot measures, and disabled adapters. They collectively represent the biggest risk to system coverage.

hyperedges.label: Search Pipeline Data Flow
hyperedges.description: The end-to-end search pipeline: query expansion feeds the orchestrator, which routes through the adapter registry, then results go through currency conversion, condition filtering, and shipping estimation.

nodes.label: Ducati Parts Finder
nodes.description: Claude Code skill that finds used Ducati parts across 15+ European marketplaces, prioritizing cheap Eastern EU sources for cost arbitrage.

nodes.label: BIKE_MODEL Environment Variable
nodes.description: Configurable target bike model via BIKE_MODEL env var, defaults to Multistrada 1260 Enduro. Overrides bike.default_model in YAML config.

nodes.label: Tier 1 - Cheap Eastern EU
nodes.description: OLX Bulgaria, OLX Romania, OLX Poland, Allegro (PL), Jofogas (HU), Bazos (CZ/SK), Njuskalo (HR), Bolha (SI). Searched by default.

nodes.label: Tier 2 - Moderate
nodes.description: Subito.it (IT), eBay EU (IT/DE/FR/ES/GB), Moto Breakers (GB). Searched by default.

nodes.label: Tier 3 - Expensive Western EU
nodes.description: Kleinanzeigen (DE), Leboncoin (FR), Wallapop (ES), Facebook Marketplace. Opt-in only.

nodes.label: Cost Arbitrage Strategy
nodes.description: Core value proposition: parts from Bulgaria, Romania, Hungary, Poland cost significantly less than Western EU.

nodes.label: Total Cost Filtering Design Decision
nodes.description: Budget caps apply to part + shipping combined, not just part price. Rationale: users care about total landed cost, not just sticker price.

nodes.label: No ORM Design Decision
nodes.description: Direct sqlite3 used instead of ORM for simplicity and control.

nodes.label: Pluggable Adapters Pattern
nodes.description: eBay uses Browse API; all other marketplaces use Playwright headless Chrome. Adapters are pluggable and registered centrally.

nodes.label: No Config Fallbacks Design Decision
nodes.description: Missing configuration raises exceptions rather than silently defaulting. Explicit-over-implicit philosophy.

nodes.label: EU Preferred Policy
nodes.description: UK listings include customs warning; non-EU sellers excluded entirely.

nodes.label: Skeleton Adapters
nodes.description: CSS selectors for browser-based scrapers need refinement against live sites.

nodes.label: src/adapters/
nodes.description: Marketplace adapters including eBay API and Playwright scrapers. Central registration via registry.py.

nodes.label: src/core/
nodes.description: Core modules: config, types, search orchestrator, shipping, currency, condition assessment.

nodes.label: src/catalog/
nodes.description: OEM cross-reference resolver and parts catalog seeder.

nodes.label: src/db/
nodes.description: SQLite layer for listings, watches, seen items, and catalog.

nodes.label: src/reports/
nodes.description: Terminal summary formatter and Jinja2 HTML report generator.

nodes.label: src/watch/
nodes.description: Watch list system: CRUD, cron runner, macOS notifications, launchd scheduler.

nodes.label: src/cli.py
nodes.description: CLI entry point for search and watch operations.

nodes.label: SearchOrchestrator
nodes.description: Core search orchestrator handling tier routing, filtering, and deduplication.

nodes.label: ShippingEstimator
nodes.description: Shipping cost estimation by country to Athens, Greece.

nodes.label: CurrencyConverter
nodes.description: ECB rate conversion with 24-hour in-memory caching.

nodes.label: ConditionFilter
nodes.description: Multi-language condition filtering with green/yellow/red scoring.

nodes.label: CompatibilityResolver
nodes.description: OEM part number cross-referencing between Multistrada 1260 and 1260 Enduro.

nodes.label: WatchManager
nodes.description: Watch list CRUD operations.

nodes.label: Database
nodes.description: SQLite database layer for listings, watches, seen items, and catalog.

nodes.label: Adapter Registry
nodes.description: Central adapter registration in registry.py.

nodes.label: macOS Native Notifications
nodes.description: Watch list triggers macOS native notifications when matching parts appear.

nodes.label: HTML Report Generator
nodes.description: Rich HTML reports with photos, filtering, and condition color coding using Jinja2.

nodes.label: PlaywrightBaseAdapter
nodes.description: Base adapter for all Playwright-based marketplace scrapers.

nodes.label: eBay Adapter
nodes.description: eBay Browse API adapter using OAuth2 authentication.

nodes.label: Issue: Facebook Adapter Fragility
nodes.description: Facebook actively blocks automation. Adapter requires periodic maintenance. Consider email notification fallback from Facebook Groups.

nodes.label: Issue: CSS Selector Validation
nodes.description: All Playwright-based adapters have initial CSS selectors that need validation against live sites via smoke_test_live.py.

nodes.label: Issue: JS-Heavy Specialist Adapters
nodes.description: BMotor (HU), MaleDucati (HU), and some PrestaShop adapters return empty results due to AJAX/client-side search. May need longer timeouts or explicit JS interaction.

nodes.label: Issue: Specialist Adapter Selector Validation
nodes.description: DucStore, MotorradteileHannover, French/Spanish PrestaShop, UK WooCommerce returned EMPTY on first smoke test.

nodes.label: Issue: Shipping Estimate Refinement
nodes.description: Current shipping estimates are rough ranges. Could improve with actual carrier APIs (DHL, DPD, etc.).

nodes.label: Issue: eBay Additional Image Extraction
nodes.description: Currently only extracts primary listing image. Browse API supports additional images.

nodes.label: Issue: MotoBreakers Adapter Disabled
nodes.description: Disabled, needs separate research on site structure and scraping approach.

nodes.label: Issue: DucatiParts.cz Domain Redirect
nodes.description: ducatiparts.cz redirects to eshop.krejbichmeccanica.cz. Adapter updated but needs monitoring.

nodes.label: Completed: 23 Specialist Ducati Adapters
nodes.description: Breakers and Ducati-only shops across IT (5), DE (4), FR (4), ES (3), UK (4), HU (2), CZ (1). 183 unit tests passing.

nodes.label: Completed: Currency Rate Caching
nodes.description: ECB rates cached for 24 hours in-memory via CurrencyConverter._rates_fetched_at.

nodes.label: Completed: OEM Part Number Database Expansion
nodes.description: Seed catalog expanded from 17 to 34 parts with enduro-specific and shared parts.
nodes.norm_label: completed: oem part number database expansion

nodes.label: Completed: Search Pipeline Data Flow
nodes.description: Currency conversion wired into orchestrator, multi-language query expansion (30 terms, 12 languages), bilingual relevance filter, parallel adapter execution with per-adapter timeout.

nodes.label: Completed: Adapter Resource Cleanup
nodes.description: Playwright browser processes cleaned up via try/finally in CLI after search completes.

nodes.label: Knowledge Graph Report
nodes.description: Graph analysis report: 677 nodes, 1305 edges, 57 communities. Corpus ~49,807 words.

nodes.label: RawListing (God Node)
nodes.description: Most connected node with 96 edges and betweenness centrality 0.257. Cross-community bridge spanning 9 communities.

nodes.label: PlaywrightBaseAdapter (God Node)
nodes.description: Second most connected node with 87 edges and betweenness centrality 0.092. Bridges 8 communities.

nodes.label: Multi-Language Query Expansion
nodes.description: 30 terms across 12 languages for search query expansion.

nodes.label: Marketplace Tiering System
nodes.description: Three-tier system organizing 15+ marketplaces by cost level: cheap Eastern EU, moderate, and expensive Western EU.

Both are cross-community bridge nodes serving as core abstractions that most other components depend on. RawListing is the data contract, PlaywrightBaseAdapter is the extraction contract.
